ocr_findings.description: Diagram labels (ニューロン, 層が少ないニューラルネットワーク, 層が多いニューラルネットワーク（ディープラーニング）) represented as image placeholder + bare table row rather than inline text; caption text is preserved correctly in the table.
OCR uses '何重にも重ねる' while image text reads '何重にも重ねる' — identical; no error. Minor: image bold styling on key phrases faithfully rendered with markdown bold in cleaned output.

reviewer_notes: Page is a regular learning-content page explaining ニューラルネットワーク and ディープラーニング with a diagram and two 試験にはコレが出る callout boxes. All body text, section heading, and callout bullet points are faithfully captured. Diagram image is referenced as a placeholder which is acceptable for figures. Page footer '134' in image corresponds to pipeline page_150 offset.
